title: 10 health benefits of Lithospermum erythrorhizon (red shiso)
intro: Lithospermum erythrorhizon has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. These medicinal properties can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce the risk of chronic diseases like heart disease and cancer, and even soothe digestive issues. For instance, consuming red shiso tea may improve digestion and relieve stomach pain, allowing individuals to enjoy their favorite foods without discomfort. Additionally, topical applications of red shiso essential oil may reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, enhancing overall quality of life.
